productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Tan Brown Floater
description: Casual look, stylish touch - that's what these slides from red tape have to offer. Perfect for those casual days, these slippers are all that you need to pamper your feet. Upper Wide leather strap with an open toe for easy wear, durability and comfort Padded fabric inner for a comfortable wear and to prevent abrasion Stitch detailing on the upper for durability and style Midsole PU midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protection Heavily cushioned suede footbed for all-day comfort Outsole Durable rubber outsole with multi-directional lugs strategically placed for maximum grip and traction on various surfaces Curved midfoot ergonomic comfort shoe careWipe leather surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineUse a suede brush to dust suede surfaceDo not store in direct sunlight
